items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: A Thanksgiving Bet
items.description: What Happened in Markets Today Stocks build momentum ahead of holiday. Major U.S. indexes logged their fourth consecutive day of gains on Wednesday ahead of the Thanksgiving holiday. But unless the shortened trading day on Friday produces some big gains, all are set to end November in the red.
